title: Started as a Summer Graduate Research Assistant under Dr. Li Chen
description: Began a new role as a Graduate Research Assistant (Summer GRA position), continuing research under the supervision of Dr. Li Chen, effective June 1, 2026.

title: Received the Award of Excellence, University of Louisiana at Lafayette
Two new book chapters accepted
description: "Enhancing Glaucoma Prediction Performance in OCT Images Using Machine Learning Based on HOG Features" (Visual Sensing and Ubiquitous Computing) and "Large Ensemble of Transfer-Learned Models for Plant Disease Recognition from Diverse Leaf Images" (Machine Learning for Healthcare Informatics), both CRC Press / Chapman and Hall.

title: New paper accepted at ICCIT 2025
description: "HybEEGNet: An Attention-Enhanced CNN-BiLSTM Model for EEG-Based Motor Movement Classification", 28th International Conference on Computer and Information Technology (ICCIT), 2025.

title: Began PhD in Computer Science at the University of Louisiana at Lafayette
description: Joined the School of Computing & Informatics as a Graduate Teaching Assistant, working under the supervision of Dr. Li Chen.
